title: dianthus mercurii
intro: Dianthus mercurii, also known as Mercury's Candle, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the carnation family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate congestion, and soothe sore throats. Herbal preparations of Dianthus mercurii typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from the plant's flowers and leaves.
